title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm on an outing with Fuji Kiseki one day, when...

"Trainer! Trainer! Won't you dance a fun little
dance with me?"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It feels like the voice came from inside a nearby
claw machine filled with plush toys...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! I really got you there! It was just me. Did
you like my little trick?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Just look at all the adorable ponies they've got
here!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I wish I could let them out and bring them to the
stage, but...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It would take a lot of work to win them... Gosh,
just what should I do?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gives me an imploring smile, and I take her
not-so-subtle hint.
choice_data_list: I'll get as many of them as possible!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
There may be consequences if you don't get any,
so do your best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
